# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

admin:
  access_log_path: "/tmp/admin_access.log"
  address:
    socket_address: { address: "0.0.0.0", port_value: 9901 }

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_0
    address:
      socket_address: { address: "0.0.0.0", port_value: 8080 }
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          codec_type: AUTO
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend
              domains: ["*"]
              routes:
              - match: { prefix: "/" }
                route: 
                  cluster: service_backend
                  retry_policy:
                    retry_on: 5xx,gateway-error,connect-failure,refused-stream
                    num_retries: 3
                  timeout: 10s # Timeout Configuration
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.router  # Router Filter

  clusters:
  - name: service_backend
    connect_timeout: 0.25s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    hosts: [{ socket_address: { address: "localhost", port_value: 12345 }}]
